# `McpServer` manifest

Reference for `kind: McpServer` (apiVersion `vais.agents/v1`). Authoring schema: [`McpServer.schema.json`](../schemas/McpServer.schema.json).

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: vais.agents/v1
kind: McpServer
metadata:
  id: example-mcp
  version: "1.0"
  description: Example MCP server.
spec:
  transport: streamableHttp
  url: http://localhost:3000/mcp
  virtual: false
```
